stemHtml: You are flying a VFR flight in VMC and are in contact with ATC. Suddenly you experience a communication failure. ATC cannot now give you further instructions but would expect you to...

options.a: Continue your flight as best as possible according to your flight plan
options.c: Maintain your last assigned level and heading for 20 minutes
options.d: Descend immediately to circuit altitude and orbit until communications are restored
